technical.question: Explain the difference between synchronous and asynchronous programming. When would you use each?
How would you design a URL shortener service like bit.ly? Walk through your design decisions.
What is your approach to debugging a production issue that you cannot reproduce locally?
Describe a time when you had to optimize a slow-performing piece of code. What was your process?
How do you ensure code quality in a team environment? What practices do you advocate?
What data structure would you use for implementing an LRU cache? Explain your choice.
Walk me through how you would build a RESTful API from scratch. What considerations do you make?
How do you approach database schema design for a new feature? What principles guide you?

behavioral.question: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a technical decision. How did you handle it?
Describe a project where you had to learn a new technology quickly. How did you approach it?
Tell me about a time you made a mistake in production. What happened and what did you learn?
How do you prioritize your work when you have multiple deadlines?

technical.question: How would you prioritize features when everything seems important?
Walk me through how you would define success metrics for a new product launch.
How do you balance user needs, business goals, and technical constraints?
Describe your process for conducting user research and translating findings into product decisions.

behavioral.question: Tell me about a time you had to convince stakeholders to change direction. How did you approach it?
Describe a product you launched that didn't meet expectations. What did you learn?

technical.question: Explain the bias-variance tradeoff and how it affects model selection.
How would you handle a dataset with significant missing values? Walk through your approach.
Design an A/B test for a new feature. How do you determine sample size and significance?
How do you decide between using a simple model vs. a complex one in production?

behavioral.question: Tell me about a time your model performed well offline but poorly in production. What happened?
How do you communicate complex statistical findings to non-technical stakeholders?

technical.question: Walk me through your design process from brief to final deliverable.
How do you decide when to follow design conventions vs. when to innovate?
How do you measure the success of a design? What metrics do you track?

behavioral.question: Tell me about a time your design was challenged. How did you respond?
Describe a time you had to design under tight constraints. How did you approach it?

technical.question: How would you develop a go-to-market strategy for a new product?
How do you measure ROI across different marketing channels?
Walk me through how you would plan and execute a product launch campaign.

behavioral.question: Tell me about a campaign that underperformed. What did you learn and how did you adjust?

technical.question: Walk me through your sales process from prospecting to close.
How do you handle objections related to pricing?
How do you build and manage a pipeline of prospects?

behavioral.question: Tell me about your biggest deal. What made it successful?
Describe a time you lost a deal you expected to win. What happened?
Why are you interested in this role and our company?
Where do you see yourself in 3-5 years?
What is your greatest professional strength? Give a specific example.
What is an area you are actively working to improve?
Describe your ideal work environment and management style.
Tell me about a time you went above and beyond for a project.
How do you handle working with difficult colleagues or clients?
What questions do you have for us?
